name: Commerce Bank & Trust
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank in Winter Park, FL offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and investment products with local decision-making.
description_long:
Commerce Bank & Trust is a locally-owned, FDIC-insured community bank headquartered in Winter Park, Florida. The bank emphasizes its roots in the Central Florida community and its commitment to personalized, locally-made financial decisions. Founded with over 100 years of combined lending experience among its leadership team, CB&T positions itself as an alternative to larger regional and national banks.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of personal banking services including checking and savings accounts, money market accounts, CDs and IRAs, safe deposit boxes, home loans, and personal loans. For business customers, CB&T provides business checking, savings, money market accounts, and commercial loans. All deposit products are FDIC-insured. Customers can access services through the Winter Park lobby (Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm, Friday 9am-5pm), drive-through banking (Monday-Friday 8am-5pm), online banking portal, and a mobile app. The bank features a loan calculator tool and allows appointment scheduling for personalized service.

CB&T distinguishes itself through its emphasis on local ownership and decision-making, contrasting with national chain banks. The bank specifically targets Central Florida's small businesses, professionals, and residents. Their marketing highlights personalized attention and a community-focused mission statement, though specific details are not provided on the website. The presence of a management team and board of directors page suggests an established organizational structure.

As a small community bank, CB&T's primary limitations include geographic constraint to one Winter Park location and likely higher fees or lower rates compared to large national banks with economies of scale. The website lacks specific rate information, fee schedules, or detailed product terms, requiring customers to contact the bank directly. No information about credit cards, wealth management, or investment advisory services is mentioned, limiting its appeal to customers seeking comprehensive financial services. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: CDs and IRAs with FDIC insurance
pros: FDIC-insured deposits provide federal protection up to applicable limits
Locally-owned bank with decisions made by local management team with 100+ years combined lending experience
Mobile banking app allows account management from smartphone (view balances, deposits, transfers, bill pay)
Drive-through banking available Monday-Friday 8am-5pm for convenience
Wide range of personal and business products including checking, savings, money market, CDs, IRAs, and loans
Loan calculator tool available online to estimate monthly payments before applying
Appointment scheduling available for personalized banking consultations
Safe deposit boxes offered for document and valuables storage
cons: Single physical location (Winter Park, FL) limits accessibility for customers outside Central Florida area
Website lacks specific interest rates, APY percentages, and fee schedules—customers must call or visit to compare
No information about credit cards, investment advisory, wealth management, or other expanded services
Limited online presence and marketing compared to larger regional banks may indicate smaller deposit base and fewer product innovations
Business hours are relatively traditional (lobby closes at 4pm weekdays except Friday) compared to 24/7 online-only alternatives

contact.address: 1201 S Orlando Ave, Winter Park, FL 32789

best_for: Small business owners and professionals in Central Florida seeking relationship-based commercial banking
Central Florida residents who value local community bank ownership and decision-making over national chain banks
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured savings and straightforward deposit products without complex investment products
Individuals seeking personalized loan consultations for home purchases, refinancing, or personal loans
diagnosis: Commerce Bank & Trust is best for Central Florida residents and small business owners who prioritize local ownership, relationship banking, and FDIC-protected deposits over competitive rates or extensive product offerings. The main caveat is the single-location footprint and lack of transparent pricing online, requiring direct contact for rate and fee comparisons—making it less suitable for customers seeking convenience or quick rate shopping.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 1201 S Orlando Ave, Winter Park, FL 32789
